name: Shaadi Ke Side Effects
overview: Abbas is a truck driver with 7 secret wives across Bangladesh! He thinks wife number 8 will bring bad luck. But when he falls for clever, fun-loving Sundori, things go wild—with a drul deal gone wrong, and crooks, chaos, and cops chasing him! Can Abbas handle one more wife or, will she handle him?
